mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_swap_rate ( id, symbol, long_rate, short_rate, rollover_time, effective_from ) VALUES ( FLOOR(RAND() * 900000000000000000) + 100000000000000000, #{symbol}, #{longRate}, #{shortRate}, #{rolloverTime}, #{effectiveFrom} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE long_rate = VALUES(long_rate), short_rate = VALUES(short_rate), rollover_time = VALUES(rollover_time)
